meta.title: IT'S HAPPENING!!! #ASTROAWARDS2024
meta.description:
http://astroawards2024.com

The Everyday Astronaut team is so excited to host our first in-person event and awards show in Austin, TX on January 13-14, 2024! Our mission: to honor and celebrate the revolutionary humans behind the hardware and missions by inviting them to accept an award IN REAL LIFE! We're merging the space industry with everyday people for the ultimate party and celebration of human achievement.

Visit http://astroawards2024.com to get more details and to get tickets!
